summary: First-finish smoke test: backend endpoints, auth guards, admin allowlist, Canva 'not configured' gating, projects CRUD, AI classify, and frontend Home/Gallery/Detail/Login/Admin-redirect all verified working via public URL.
passed: Filters: featured=true -> 6; organization=FIRST Robotics -> 3 (only FIRST Robotics); q=season -> 1
sort=alphabetical returns A-Z (Ching Scholars.., Competition Banner, FBLC..)
Bearer token auth: /api/auth/me returns seeded user; /api/admin/dashboard returns totals, canva_configured=false, canva_accounts=[]
Admin allowlist: GET returns both seeded emails; POST new email ok:true; DELETE ok:true
PUT /api/projects/{id} authenticated updates tags+featured (verified via GET)

POST /api/ai/classify/{id} returns ok:true with result object (organization/category/tags/featured) — falls back to defaults (ai_source=error) since LLM call likely rate-limited/unreachable; endpoint contract satisfied
Frontend Home: hero 'Crafting stories through' visible, stats show 16 projects, featured grid renders, purple accent + Playfair heading preserved
Frontend Gallery: 16 project cards in masonry; search 'season' filters to 1
Frontend Detail (/project/season-highlight-reel): title 'Season Highlight Reel' and 'Open in Canva' button visible
Frontend /login shows Google sign-in; /admin without auth redirects to /login
action_items: Optional: AI classify falls back to defaults (ai_source=error). Endpoint contract is met, but verify EMERGENT_LLM_KEY / emergentintegrations connectivity if real classification is needed.
test_credentials: Seeded via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md. Admin session_token used for authenticated tests; non-allowlist user seeded to verify 403.
notes: 401s on /api/auth/me from unauthenticated pages are expected (useAuth probes session). Canva env vars intentionally empty per PRD.
